texto: Women, the most beautiful things in the world,” answers the model. As if it’s the only thing worth painting, as if everyone should aspire to it. Normally coming from a guy that answer would sound so incredibly skeezy—a greasy, obvious pick-up line. But something about this guy’s earnest tone tells me he means it." -from Model Position by Kitsy Clare
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kitsy Clare: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “Women, the most beautiful things in the world,” answers the model. As if it’s the only thing wort…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, artist, grad-school pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de grad-school e new-adult-romance.
